Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.barrier.SafetyBarrier

Packages that use SafetyBarrier
Package
Description
neqsim.mcp.runners
 
neqsim.process.safety.barrier
Barrier management objects for process safety functions and safety critical elements.

    Evaluates whether the barrier can be credited based on status and evidence.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.findRelatedSafetyInstrumentedFunctions(SafetyBarrier barrier)

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.inferCategoryFromSafetyCriticalElement(SafetyBarrier barrier)
    Infers category from SCE type when text classification was inconclusive.

    SafetySystemDemand.matches(SafetyBarrier barrier)
    Checks whether this demand case applies to a barrier.

    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer.matchesBarrierTags(MeasurementDeviceInterface device, SafetyBarrier barrier)
